title: iochroma gesnerioides var. flavum
intro: Iochroma gesnerioides var. flavum, also known as yellow flowering jaltomata, is a plant species in the family Solanaceae, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible fruits. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iochroma gesnerioides var. flavum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water.
